intro: Four systems I build most often. Each one is a fixed-scope package, not a custom project, so they ship fast.

cards.title: Missed call text-back
cards.what_it_does: Every unanswered call gets an automatic text within 30 seconds so the lead stays warm until you're free to call back.
cards.cost_without_it: A solo dental office missing 6 calls a day at an average new-patient value of $600 bleeds roughly $1,200 a month in lost bookings.
cards.time_to_live: Running in 2 to 3 days after the kickoff call.

cards.title: Instant lead response
cards.what_it_does: New form fills, ad clicks, and voicemails get a qualifying text inside 60 seconds, book the prospect to your calendar, and notify you only when it's real.
cards.cost_without_it: Studies show replying in 5 minutes closes 21 times more business than replying in 30, and most owners reply in 2 hours or more.

cards.title: Review management
cards.what_it_does: Two hours after every job is marked complete, the customer gets a one-tap link to leave a Google review while the work is still fresh.
cards.cost_without_it: A salon stuck at 31 reviews while the competitor sits at 147 loses roughly 25 to 30 percent of map-pack visibility every month.

cards.title: Booking confirmation sequences
cards.what_it_does: Automatic 24-hour and 1-hour reminders with a self-serve reschedule link cut no-shows roughly in half.
cards.cost_without_it: A cleaning company running 40 jobs a month at 15 percent no-shows wastes 6 slots worth about $1,800 in revenue and drive time.
